description: Aisha Abdullahi (patient identifier: BAH000008) has been brought to the clinic after experiencing a severe rash following Penicillin administration at another facility. A pharmacist-prepared medication list shows she was previously prescribed Penicillin V, Paracetamol, and Ferrous Sulfate. Perform a comprehensive medication reconciliation for this patient by documenting the Penicillin allergy with appropriate severity and reaction type, discontinuing the Penicillin V drug order, and prescribing a safe non-penicillin alternative antibiotic. Record a clinical encounter note summarizing the allergy discovery and medication changes. Access Bahmni at https://localhost/bahmni/home (login: superman / Admin123).
